deployment.deployment_note: Code pushed to GitHub. Add deployment token and trigger workflow for automatic deployment. See DEPLOYMENT.md for instructions.
deployment.render_deploy_instructions: 1. Go to render.com, 2. New Web Service, 3. Connect kganjam/saas-pricing-intelligence-api, 4. Deploy
deployment.fly_deploy_instructions: 1. Install flyctl, 2. fly auth login, 3. fly launch --name saas-pricing-api, 4. fly deploy
deployment.github_actions_fly: Add FLY_API_TOKEN secret to GitHub repo, workflow at .github/workflows/deploy.yml
deployment.github_actions_render: Add RENDER_API_TOKEN and RENDER_SERVICE_ID secrets to GitHub repo
